gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings, verified tests/test_model_profiles.py, and approved the fail-closed model profile schema hardening.
verification: python -m pytest tests/test_model_profiles.py; python -m pytest tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py::test_repository_directories_have_readme_or_package_docstring -q; python -m pytest -q; poetry check; poetry install --dry-run; poetry install --dry-run --extras databricks --extras test; poetry build; GPT-5.5 review approved with no findings.
what_changed: ModelProfileDefinition JSON artifacts now reject unsupported top-level keys while preserving metadata as the extension point.
why: Keeps layout-critical model profile artifacts deterministic and fail-closed for future Qwen3.5, MiniMax, MQA, GQA, and KV Packet integrations.
